```html
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Nathan a 3 ans ! - Super Mario</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bangers&family=Fredoka:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  @page { size: A3 portrait; margin: 0; }

  body {
    width: 297mm;
    min-height: 420mm;
    margin: 0 auto;
    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    background: #2196F3;
  }

  .poster {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 420mm;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #64B5F6 0%, #2196F3 30%, #1565C0 70%, #0D47A1 100%);
  }

  /* Clouds */
  .clouds {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 250px;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .cloud {
    position: absolute;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 50px;
    opacity: 0.9;
  }
  .cloud::before, .cloud::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 50%;
  }
  .cloud1 { width: 120px; height: 40px; top: 30px; left: 5%; }
  .cloud1::before { width: 50px; height: 50px; top: -25px; left: 15px; }
  .cloud1::after { width: 70px; height: 60px; top: -30px; left: 40px; }

  .cloud2 { width: 150px; height: 45px; top: 60px; right: 8%; }
  .cloud2::before { width: 60px; height: 55px; top: -28px; left: 20px; }
  .cloud2::after { width: 80px; height: 65px; top: -35px; left: 50px; }

  .cloud3 { width: 100px; height: 35px; top: 100px; left: 30%; }
  .cloud3::before { width: 45px; height: 45px; top: -22px; left: 10px; }
  .cloud3::after { width: 60px; height: 50px; top: -28px; left: 35px; }

  .cloud4 { width: 130px; height: 42px; top: 20px; left: 55%; }
  .cloud4::before { width: 55px; height: 52px; top: -26px; left: 18px; }
  .cloud4::after { width: 72px; height: 58px; top: -32px; left: 48px; }

  /* Question blocks */
  .question-block {
    width: 55px; height: 55px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD54F, #FF8F00);
    border: 4px solid #5D4037;
    border-radius: 6px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
    font-size: 26px;
    color: #5D4037;
    position: absolute;
    box-shadow: inset 2px 2px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.4), inset -2px -2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .qb1 { top: 160px; left: 4%; }
  .qb2 { top: 180px; right: 6%; }
  .qb3 { top: 350px; left: 8%; }
  .qb4 { top: 370px; right: 4%; }
  .qb5 { bottom: 280px; left: 3%; }
  .qb6 { bottom: 300px; right: 7%; }

  /* Brick blocks */
  .brick {
    width: 55px; height: 55px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #A1887F, #795548);
    border: 3px solid #4E342E;
    border-radius: 4px;
    position: absolute;
    box-shadow: inset 2px 2px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2), inset -2px -2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .brick::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    height: 3px;
    background: #4E342E;
  }
  .brick::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    width: 3px;
    background: #4E342E;
  }
  .br1 { top: 160px; left: calc(4% + 58px); }
  .br2 { top: 160px; left: calc(4% + 116px); }
  .br3 { top: 180px; right: calc(6% + 58px); }

  /* TITLE SECTION */
  .title-section {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 10;
    text-align: center;
    padding-top: 35px;
    padding-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .subtitle-top {
    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #FFF;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
  }

  .main-title {
    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
    font-size: 100px;
    color: #FFD600;
    text-shadow:
      4px 4px 0 #E65100,
      8px 8px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3),
      0 0 30px rgba(255,214,0,0.5);
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    -webkit-text-stroke: 2px #E65100;
  }

  .age-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F44336, #D32F2F);
    color: white;
    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
    font-size: 72px;
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    line-height: 130px;
    text-align: center;
    border: 6px solid #FFEB3B;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), inset 0 -3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    margin: 10px auto;
    text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }

  .age-text {
    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #FFF;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    letter-spacing: 3px;
  }

  /* Characters */
  .character {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 15;
    filter: drop-shadow(4px 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.4));
  }
  .character img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
  }
  .mario-character {
    width: 200px;
    height: 220px;
    bottom: 130px;
    left: 5%;
  }
  .koopa-character {
    width: 130px;
    height: 170px;
    bottom: 130px;
    right: 6%;
  }
  .mushroom-left {
    width: 80px;
    height: 80px;
    bottom: 200px;
    left: 25%;
  }
  .mushroom-right {
    width: 70px;
    height: 70px;
    top: 340px;
    right: 12%;
  }
  .mushroom-small {
    width: 55px;
    height: 55px;
    top: 350px;
    left: 10%;
  }

  /* PHOTO SECTION */
  .photos-section {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 10;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 30px;
    padding: 15px 40px;
    margin-top: 5px;
  }

  .photo-frame {
    position: relative;
    border-radius: 20px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 8px solid #FFEB3B;
    box-shadow:
      0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4),
      0 0 0 4px #E65100,
      inset 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    transform: rotate(-2deg);
    width: 45%;
    max-width: 340px;
  }
  .photo-frame:nth-child(2) {
    transform: rotate(2deg);
  }
  .photo-frame img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 350px;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }

  /* Invitation section */
  .invitation-section {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 12;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 40px 15px;
  }

  .invitation-box {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 20px 40px;
    border: 5px solid #FFEB3B;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 3px #E65100;
    max-width: 650px;
  }

  .invitation-text {
    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #D32F2F;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }

  .invitation-detail {
    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 24px;
    color: #1565C0;
    margin-top: 8px;
  }

  /* Coins */
  .coin {
    position: absolute;
    width: 35px;
    height: 40px;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse, #FFF176, #FFD600, #FF8F00);
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 3px solid #E65100;
    z-index: 5;
    box-shadow: 2px 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .coin::after {
    content: '\2605';
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #E65100;
  }
  .c1 { top: 250px; left: 20%; }
  .c2 { top: 270px; left: 24%; }
  .c3 { top: 250px; left: 28%; }
  .c4 { top: 250px; right: 20%; }
  .c5 { top: 270px; right: 24%; }
  .c6 { top: 250px; right: 28%; }

  /* Stars */
  .star {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 5;
  }
  .star svg { filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)); }
  .star1 { top: 45px; left: 8%; }
  .star2 { top: 55px; right: 8%; }
  .star3 { top: 200px; left: 15%; }
  .star4 { top: 210px; right: 12%; }

  /* Bottom text */
  .bottom-text {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 95px;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    text-align: center;
    z-index: 12;
  }
  .party-text {
    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
    font-size: 50px;
    color: #FFF;
    text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #E65100, 6px 6px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    letter-spacing: 3px;
  }

  /* Pipe decoration at bottom */
  .ground-section {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    z-index: 8;
  }

  .ground {
    height: 80px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4CAF50, #2E7D32);
    border-top: 8px solid #1B5E20;
    position: relative;
  }
  .ground::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -15px;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    height: 20px;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(
      90deg,
      transparent, transparent 30px,
      #388E3C 30px, #388E3C 32px
    );
  }

  /* Green pipes */
  .pipe {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 70px;
    z-index: 9;
  }
  .pipe-body {
    width: 70px;
    height: 100px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2E7D32, #4CAF50, #66BB6A, #4CAF50, #2E7D32);
    border: 3px solid #1B5E20;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .pipe-top {
    width: 86px;
    height: 30px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2E7D32, #4CAF50, #66BB6A, #4CAF50, #2E7D32);
    border: 3px solid #1B5E20;
    border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .pipe-left { left: 3%; }
  .pipe-right { right: 3%; }

  /* Rainbow trail */
  .rainbow {
    position: absolute;
    top: 280px;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    height: 12px;
    z-index: 2;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg,
      #F44336 0%, #F44336 16%,
      #FF9800 16%, #FF9800 33%,
      #FFEB3B 33%, #FFEB3B 50%,
      #4CAF50 50%, #4CAF50 66%,
      #2196F3 66%, #2196F3 83%,
      #9C27B0 83%, #9C27B0 100%
    );
    opacity: 0.6;
  }

  @media print {
    body { width: 297mm; }
    .poster { min-height: 420mm; }
  }
</style>
</head>
```

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
<title>Nathan a 3 ans ! - Super Mario</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bangers&family=Fredoka:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    margin: 0;
    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #2196F3;
  }

  .poster {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100vh;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #64B5F6 0%, #2196F3 30%, #1565C0 70%, #0D47A1 100%);
  }

  /* Clouds */
  .clouds {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 15vh;
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .cloud {
    position: absolute;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 50px;
    opacity: 0.9;
  }
  .cloud::before, .cloud::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 50%;
  }
  .cloud1 { width: 10vw; height: 3vh; top: 2vh; left: 5%; }
  .cloud1::before { width: 4vw; height: 4vh; top: -2.5vh; left: 1.5vw; }
  .cloud1::after { width: 6vw; height: 5vh; top: -3vh; left: 3vw; }

  .cloud2 { width: 12vw; height: 3.5vh; top: 5vh; right: 8%; }
  .cloud2::before { width: 5vw; height: 4.5vh; top: -2.8vh; left: 2vw; }
  .cloud2::after { width: 7vw; height: 5vh; top: -3.5vh; left: 4vw; }

  .cloud3 { width: 8vw; height: 2.5vh; top: 9vh; left: 30%; }
  .cloud3::before { width: 3.5vw; height: 3.5vh; top: -2vh; left: 1vw; }
  .cloud3::after { width: 5vw; height: 4vh; top: -2.5vh; left: 3vw; }

  .cloud4 { width: 10vw; height: 3vh; top: 1.5vh; left: 55%; }
  .cloud4::before { width: 4.5vw; height: 4vh; top: -2.5vh; left: 1.5vw; }
  .cloud4::after { width: 6vw; height: 4.5vh; top: -3vh; left: 4vw; }

  /* Question blocks */
  .question-block {
    width: 4vw; height: 4vw;
    max-width: 45px; max-height: 45px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD54F, #FF8F00);
    border: 3px solid #5D4037;
    border-radius: 5px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
    font-size: clamp(12px, 2vw, 20px);
    color: #5D4037;
    position: absolute;
    box-shadow: inset 2px 2px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.4), inset -2px -2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 2px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .qb1 { top: 12vh; left: 3%; }
  .qb2 { top: 14vh; right: 4%; }
  .qb3 { top: 42vh; left: 2%; }
  .qb4 { top: 44vh; right: 3%; }

  /* Brick blocks */
  .brick {
    width: 4vw; height: 4vw;
    max-width: 45px; max-height: 45px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #A1887F, #795548);
    border: 2px solid #4E342E;
    border-radius: 3px;
    position: absolute;
    box-shadow: inset 2px 2px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2), inset -2px -2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .brick::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 2px;
    background: #4E342E;
  }
  .brick::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%; top: 0; bottom: 0;
    width: 2px;
    background: #4E342E;
  }
  .br1 { top: 12vh; left: calc(3% + 4.5vw); }
  .br2 { top: 14vh; right: calc(4% + 4.5vw); }

  /* Stars */
  .star {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 5;
  }
  .star svg { filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)); }
  .star1 { top: 3vh; left: 8%; }
  .star2 { top: 4vh; right: 8%; }
  .star3 { top: 18vh; left: 42%; }
  .star4 { top: 45vh; right: 10%; }

  /* Coins */
  .coin {
    position: absolute;
    width: clamp(20px, 3vw, 30px);
    height: clamp(22px, 3.3vw, 33px);
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse, #FFF176, #FFD600, #FF8F00);
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid #E65100;
    z-index: 5;
    box-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .coin::after {
    content: '\2605';
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%; left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: clamp(10px, 1.5vw, 15px);
    color: #E65100;
  }
  .c1 { top: 20vh; left: 18%; }
  .c2 { top: 22vh; left: 22%; }
  .c3 { top: 20vh; left: 26%; }
  .c4 { top: 20vh; right: 18%; }
  .c5 { top: 22vh; right: 22%; }
  .c6 { top: 20vh; right: 26%; }

  /* Rainbow */
  .rainbow {
    position: absolute;
    top: 19vh;
    left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 8px;
    z-index: 2;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg,
      #F44336 0%, #F44336 16%,
      #FF9800 16%, #FF9800 33%,
      #FFEB3B 33%, #FFEB3B 50%,
      #4CAF50 50%, #4CAF50 66%,
      #2196F3 66%, #2196F3 83%,
      #9C27B0 83%, #9C27B0 100%
    );
    opacity: 0.6;
  }

  /* TITLE */
  .title-section {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 10;
    text-align: center;
    padding-top: 2vh;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .subtitle-top {
    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: clamp(14px, 2.5vw, 24px);
    color: #FFF;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .main-title {
    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
    font-size: clamp(40px, 10vw, 90px);
    color: #FFD600;
    text-shadow:
      3px 3px 0 #E65100,
      6px 6px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3),
      0 0 20px rgba(255,214,0,0.5);
    letter-spacing: 5px;
    line-height: 1;
    -webkit-text-stroke: 2px #E65100;
  }
  .age-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F44336, #D32F2F);
    color: white;
    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 7vw, 60px);
    width: clamp(70px, 12vw, 110px);
    height: clamp(70px, 12vw, 110px);
    border-radius: 50%;
    line-height: clamp(70px, 12vw, 110px);
    text-align: center;
    border: 5px solid #FFEB3B;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), inset 0 -2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    margin: 0.5vh auto;
    text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .age-text {
    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
    font-size: clamp(18px, 3.5vw, 28px);
    color: #FFF;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    letter-spacing: 3px;
  }

  /* PHOTOS */
  .photos-section {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 10;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: clamp(10px, 2vw, 25px);
    padding: 1vh 5vw;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .photo-frame {
    position: relative;
    border-radius: 15px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 5px solid #FFEB3B;
    box-shadow:
      0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4),
      0 0 0 3px #E65100;
    transform: rotate(-2deg);
    width: 42%;
    max-width: 300px;
  }
  .photo-frame:nth-child(2) {
    transform: rotate(2deg);
  }
  .photo-frame img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 22vh;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }

  /* INVITATION */
  .invitation-section {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 12;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 1.5vh 5vw;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .invitation-box {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
    border-radius: 15px;
    padding: 1.5vh 4vw;
    border: 4px solid #FFEB3B;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 2px #E65100;
  }
  .invitation-text {
    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: clamp(14px, 2.8vw, 24px);
    color: #D32F2F;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .invitation-detail {
    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: clamp(13px, 2.5vw, 22px);
    color: #1565C0;
    margin-top: 0.5vh;
  }

  /* Characters */
  .character {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 15;
    filter: drop-shadow(3px 3px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.4));
  }
  .character img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
  }
  .mario-character {
    width: clamp(100px, 18vw, 180px);
    height: clamp(110px, 20vw, 200px);
    bottom: 6vh;
    left: 3%;
  }
  .koopa-character {
    width: clamp(70px, 12vw, 120px);
    height: clamp(90px, 15vw, 150px);
    bottom: 6vh;
    right: 4%;
  }
  .mushroom-left {
    width: clamp(40px, 7vw, 65px);
    height: clamp(40px, 7vw, 65px);
    bottom: 18vh;
    left: 22%;
  }
  .mushroom-right {
    width: clamp(35px, 6vw, 55px);
    height: clamp(35px, 6vw, 55px);
    top: 40vh;
    right: 8%;
  }

  /* Bottom text */
  .bottom-text {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 7vh;
    left: 0; right: 0;
    text-align: center;
    z-index: 12;
  }
  .party-text {
    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
    font-size: clamp(24px, 5vw, 42px);
    color: #FFF;
    text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #E65100, 5px 5px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    letter-spacing: 3px;
  }

  /* Ground & Pipes */
  .ground-section {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0; right: 0;
    z-index: 8;
  }
  .ground {
    height: 5vh;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4CAF50, #2E7D32);
    border-top: 5px solid #1B5E20;
  }
  .ground::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -10px;
    left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 12px;
    background: repeating-linear-gradient(
      90deg,
      transparent, transparent 30px,
      #388E3C 30px, #388E3C 32px
    );
  }
  .pipe {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 5vh;
    z-index: 9;
  }
  .pipe-body {
    width: clamp(40px, 6vw, 60px);
    height: 8vh;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2E7D32, #4CAF50, #66BB6A, #4CAF50, #2E7D32);
    border: 2px solid #1B5E20;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .pipe-top {
    width: clamp(50px, 7.5vw, 75px);
    height: 2.5vh;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2E7D32, #4CAF50, #66BB6A, #4CAF50, #2E7D32);
    border: 2px solid #1B5E20;
    border-radius: 3px 3px 0 0;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .pipe-left { left: 2%; }
  .pipe-right { right: 2%; }

  @media print {
    body { width: 297mm; height: 420mm; }
    .poster { height: 420mm; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="poster">

  <!-- Clouds -->
  <div class="clouds">
    <div class="cloud cloud1"></div>
    <div class="cloud cloud2"></div>
    <div class="cloud cloud3"></div>
    <div class="cloud cloud4"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Question blocks & bricks -->
  <div class="question-block qb1">?</div>
  <div class="brick br1"></div>

  <div class="question-block qb4">?</div>

  <!-- Stars -->
  <div class="star star1">
    <svg width="35" height="35" viewBox="0 0 50 50"><polygon points="25,2 31,18 49,20 36,32 39,49 25,41 11,49 14,32 1,20 19,18" fill="#FFD600" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
  </div>
  <div class="star star2">
    <svg width="30" height="30" viewBox="0 0 50 50"><polygon points="25,2 31,18 49,20 36,32 39,49 25,41 11,49 14,32 1,20 19,18" fill="#FFD600" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
  </div>
  <div class="star star3">
    <svg width="25" height="25" viewBox="0 0 50 50"><polygon points="25,2 31,18 49,20 36,32 39,49 25,41 11,49 14,32 1,20 19,18" fill="#FFD600" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
  </div>
  <div class="star star4">
    <svg width="25" height="25" viewBox="0 0 50 50"><polygon points="25,2 31,18 49,20 36,32 39,49 25,41 11,49 14,32 1,20 19,18" fill="#FFD600" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="2"/></svg>
  </div>

  <!-- Coins -->
  <div class="coin c1"></div>
  <div class="coin c2"></div>
  <div class="coin c3"></div>
  <div class="coin c4"></div>
  <div class="coin c5"></div>
  <div class="coin c6"></div>

  <!-- Rainbow -->
  <div class="rainbow"></div>

  <!-- TITLE -->
  <div class="title-section">
    <div class="subtitle-top">Super Mario Party</div>
    <div class="main-title">NATHAN</div>
    <div class="age-badge">3</div>
    <div class="age-text">ANS !</div>
  </div>

  <!-- PHOTOS -->
  <div class="photos-section">
    <div class="photo-frame">
      <img src="images/IMG_0801_Original.JPG" alt="Nathan">
    </div>
    <div class="photo-frame">
      <img src="images/IMG_0807_Original.JPG" alt="Nathan et famille">
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- INVITATION -->
  <div class="invitation-section">
    <div class="invitation-box">
      <div class="invitation-text">Nathan vous invite<br>à son goûter d'anniversaire !</div>
      <div class="invitation-detail">Le 04 avril à 14h</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Characters Mario modernes -->
  <div class="character mario-character">
    <img src="images/mario.png" alt="Mario">
  </div>
  <div class="character koopa-character">
    <img src="images/koopa.png" alt="Koopa Troopa">
  </div>
  <div class="character mushroom-left">
    <img src="images/mushroom.png" alt="Super Champignon">
  </div>
  <div class="character mushroom-right">
    <img src="images/mushroom.png" alt="Super Champignon">
  </div>

  <!-- Bottom text -->
  <div class="bottom-text">
    <div class="party-text">LET'S-A GO !</div>
  </div>

  <!-- Pipes & Ground -->
  <div class="ground-section">
    <div class="pipe pipe-left">
      <div class="pipe-top"></div>
      <div class="pipe-body"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pipe pipe-right">
      <div class="pipe-top"></div>
      <div class="pipe-body"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ground"></div>
  </div>

</div>
</body>
</html>
```

C'est en place ! Le bas de l'affiche est maintenant un **mini-jeu Mario jouable** :

- **ESPACE / TAP** pour sauter
- Mario court automatiquement vers la droite
- **Pièces** dorées a ramasser (apparaissent à différentes hauteurs)
- **Koopa Troopas** à éviter ou à écraser en sautant dessus (+3 points)
- **Tuyaux** verts à sauter par-dessus
- La vitesse augmente progressivement
- Score affiché en haut à droite du jeu
- Game Over avec possibilité de rejouer

Rafraîchis et clique en bas pour jouer !

```text
   220→    letter-spacing: 3px;

   222→
   223→  /* PHOTOS */
   224→  .photos-section {
   225→    position: relative;
   226→    z-index: 10;
   227→    display: flex;
   228→    justify-content: center;
   229→    gap: clamp(10px, 2vw, 25px);
   230→    padding: 1vh 5vw;
   231→    flex-shrink: 0;
   232→  }
   233→  .photo-frame {
   234→    position: relative;
   235→    border-radius: 12px;
   236→    overflow: hidden;
   237→    border: 5px solid #FFEB3B;
   238→    box-shadow:
   239→      0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4),
   240→      0 0 0 3px #E65100;
   241→    transform: rotate(-1.5deg);

   243→    max-width: 320px;
   244→    aspect-ratio: 4/3;

   246→  .photo-frame:nth-child(2) {

   249→  .photo-frame img {
   250→    width: 100%;
   251→    height: 100%;
   252→    object-fit: cover;
   253→    object-position: center 25%;
   254→    display: block;
   255→  }
   256→
   257→  /* INVITATION */
   258→  .invitation-section {
   259→    position: relative;
   260→    z-index: 12;
   261→    text-align: center;
   262→    padding: 1.5vh 5vw;
   263→    flex-shrink: 0;
   264→  }
   265→  .invitation-box {

   267→    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
   268→    border-radius: 15px;
   269→    padding: 1.5vh 4vw;
   270→    border: 4px solid #FFEB3B;

   272→  }
   273→  .invitation-text {
   274→    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;
   275→    font-weight: 700;
   276→    font-size: clamp(14px, 2.8vw, 24px);

   278→    line-height: 1.3;
   279→  }
   280→  .invitation-detail {
   281→    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;

   283→    font-size: clamp(13px, 2.5vw, 22px);
   284→    color: #1565C0;
   285→    margin-top: 0.5vh;
   286→  }
   287→
   288→  /* Characters */
   289→  .character {
   290→    position: absolute;
   291→    z-index: 15;
   292→    filter: drop-shadow(3px 3px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.4));
   293→  }
   294→  .character img {
   295→    width: 100%;
   296→    height: 100%;
   297→    object-fit: contain;
   298→  }
   299→  .mushroom-left {
   300→    width: clamp(40px, 7vw, 65px);
   301→    height: clamp(40px, 7vw, 65px);
   302→    bottom: 18vh;
   303→    left: 22%;
   304→  }
   305→  .mushroom-right {
   306→    width: clamp(35px, 6vw, 55px);
   307→    height: clamp(35px, 6vw, 55px);
   308→    top: 40vh;
   309→    right: 8%;
   310→  }
   311→
   312→  /* MINI GAME */
   313→  .game-section {
   314→    position: absolute;
   315→    bottom: 0;
   316→    left: 0; right: 0;
   317→    height: 22vh;
   318→    z-index: 20;
   319→  }
   320→  #game-canvas {
   321→    width: 100%;
   322→    height: 100%;
   323→    display: block;
   324→  }
   325→  .game-start-overlay {
   326→    position: absolute;
   327→    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
   328→    display: flex;
   329→    align-items: center;
   330→    justify-content: center;
   331→    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
   332→    z-index: 25;
   333→    cursor: pointer;
   334→  }
   335→  .game-start-overlay.hidden { display: none; }
   336→  .game-start-text {
   337→    font-family: 'Bangers', cursive;
   338→    font-size: clamp(18px, 4vw, 32px);
   339→    color: #FFD600;
   340→    text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 #E65100, 4px 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
   341→    text-align: center;
   342→    line-height: 1.4;
   343→  }
   344→  .game-score {

   351→    text-shadow: 2px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
   352→    z-index: 22;

   354→
   355→  @media print {

   357→    .poster { height: 420mm; }
   358→  }
   359→</style>
```

```text
   423→  <!-- INVITATION -->

   434→  </div>
   435→  <div class="character mushroom-right">
   436→    <img src="images/mushroom.png" alt="Super Champignon">
   437→  </div>
   438→
   439→  <!-- MINI JEU MARIO -->
   440→  <div class="game-section">
   441→    <canvas id="game-canvas"></canvas>
   442→    <div class="game-score" id="game-score">COINS: 0</div>
   443→    <div class="game-start-overlay" id="game-overlay" onclick="startGame()">
   444→      <div class="game-start-text">TAP ou ESPACE<br>pour jouer !</div>
   445→    </div>

   448→</div>
   449→
   450→<script>
   451→(function() {
   452→  const canvas = document.getElementById('game-canvas');
   453→  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
   454→  const overlay = document.getElementById('game-overlay');
   455→  const scoreEl = document.getElementById('game-score');
   456→
   457→  let W, H, ground, running = false, score = 0, frame = 0;
   458→  let mario, coins, koopas, pipes, clouds;
   459→  let marioImg, koopaImg, mushImg;
   460→  let imagesLoaded = 0;
   461→
   462→  // Load images
   463→  marioImg = new Image(); marioImg.src = 'images/mario.png';
   464→  koopaImg = new Image(); koopaImg.src = 'images/koopa.png';
   465→  mushImg  = new Image(); mushImg.src  = 'images/mushroom.png';
   466→  marioImg.onload = koopaImg.onload = mushImg.onload = function() {
   467→    imagesLoaded++;
   468→    if (imagesLoaded === 3) resize();
   469→  };
   470→
   471→  function resize() {
   472→    const section = canvas.parentElement;
   473→    W = canvas.width = section.offsetWidth;
   474→    H = canvas.height = section.offsetHeight;
   475→    ground = H - 30;
   476→    if (!running) drawStatic();
   477→  }
   478→  window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
   479→
   480→  function drawStatic() {
   481→    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
   482→    // Sky
   483→    const sky = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, H);
   484→    sky.addColorStop(0, '#1565C0');
   485→    sky.addColorStop(1, '#0D47A1');
   486→    ctx.fillStyle = sky;
   487→    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
   488→    // Ground
   489→    drawGround();
   490→    // Mario standing
   491→    if (imagesLoaded >= 3) {
   492→      const mH = ground * 0.55;
   493→      const mW = mH * (marioImg.width / marioImg.height);
   494→      ctx.drawImage(marioImg, 40, ground - mH, mW, mH);
   495→    }
   496→  }
   497→
   498→  function drawGround() {
   499→    // Grass top
   500→    ctx.fillStyle = '#4CAF50';
   501→    ctx.fillRect(0, ground, W, 5);
   502→    // Dirt
   503→    ctx.fillStyle = '#8B4513';
   504→    ctx.fillRect(0, ground + 5, W, H - ground - 5);
   505→    // Grass details
   506→    ctx.fillStyle = '#388E3C';
   507→    for (let x = 0; x < W; x += 20) {
   508→      ctx.fillRect(x, ground, 2, 5);
   509→    }
   510→  }
   511→
   512→  function drawPipe(x) {
   513→    const pW = 40, pH = 50, topH = 15;
   514→    const pX = x, pY = ground - pH;
   515→    // Body
   516→    const pGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(pX, 0, pX + pW, 0);
   517→    pGrad.addColorStop(0, '#2E7D32');
   518→    pGrad.addColorStop(0.3, '#4CAF50');
   519→    pGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#66BB6A');
   520→    pGrad.addColorStop(0.7, '#4CAF50');
   521→    pGrad.addColorStop(1, '#2E7D32');
   522→    ctx.fillStyle = pGrad;
   523→    ctx.fillRect(pX, pY + topH, pW, pH - topH);
   524→    // Top
   525→    ctx.fillRect(pX - 5, pY, pW + 10, topH);
   526→    // Borders
   527→    ctx.strokeStyle = '#1B5E20';
   528→    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
   529→    ctx.strokeRect(pX, pY + topH, pW, pH - topH);
   530→    ctx.strokeRect(pX - 5, pY, pW + 10, topH);
   531→    return { x: pX - 5, y: pY, w: pW + 10, h: pH };
   532→  }
   533→
   534→  // Game objects
   535→  function initGame() {
   536→    score = 0;
   537→    frame = 0;
   538→    scoreEl.textContent = 'COINS: 0';
   539→    const mH = ground * 0.5;
   540→    const mW = mH * (marioImg.width / marioImg.height);
   541→    mario = {
   542→      x: 50, y: ground - mH, w: mW, h: mH,
   543→      vy: 0, jumping: false, grounded: true
   544→    };
   545→    coins = [];
   546→    koopas = [];
   547→    pipes = [];
   548→    clouds = [];
   549→    // Initial clouds
   550→    for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
   551→      clouds.push({ x: Math.random() * W, y: 5 + Math.random() * (H * 0.25), r: 15 + Math.random() * 15 });
   552→    }
   553→  }
   554→
   555→  function spawnCoin() {
   556→    if (Math.random() < 0.025) {
   557→      const size = 22;
   558→      // Coins either on ground or higher up
   559→      const yOptions = [ground - size - 5, ground - size - 50, ground - size - 90];
   560→      coins.push({
   561→        x: W + 10,
   562→        y: yOptions[Math.floor(Math.random() * yOptions.length)],
   563→        w: size, h: size, collected: false
   564→      });
   565→    }
   566→  }
   567→
   568→  function spawnKoopa() {
   569→    if (Math.random() < 0.008 && frame > 60) {
   570→      const kH = ground * 0.35;
   571→      const kW = kH * (koopaImg.width / koopaImg.height);
   572→      koopas.push({
   573→        x: W + 10, y: ground - kH, w: kW, h: kH,
   574→        speed: 2 + Math.random() * 1.5
   575→      });
   576→    }
   577→  }
   578→
   579→  function spawnPipe() {
   580→    if (Math.random() < 0.005 && frame > 100) {
   581→      const lastPipe = pipes[pipes.length - 1];
   582→      if (!lastPipe || lastPipe.x < W - 250) {
   583→        pipes.push({ x: W + 10 });
   584→      }
   585→    }
   586→  }
   587→
   588→  function jump() {
   589→    if (mario.grounded) {
   590→      mario.vy = -(H * 0.038);
   591→      mario.jumping = true;
   592→      mario.grounded = false;
   593→    }
   594→  }
   595→
   596→  function update() {
   597→    frame++;
   598→    const speed = 3 + Math.min(frame / 500, 3);
   599→
   600→    // Mario gravity
   601→    mario.vy += H * 0.0018;
   602→    mario.y += mario.vy;
   603→    if (mario.y >= ground - mario.h) {
   604→      mario.y = ground - mario.h;
   605→      mario.vy = 0;
   606→      mario.grounded = true;
   607→      mario.jumping = false;
   608→    }
   609→
   610→    // Move coins
   611→    coins.forEach(c => { c.x -= speed; });
   612→    coins = coins.filter(c => c.x > -30);
   613→
   614→    // Move koopas
   615→    koopas.forEach(k => { k.x -= speed + k.speed; });
   616→    koopas = koopas.filter(k => k.x > -60);
   617→
   618→    // Move pipes
   619→    pipes.forEach(p => { p.x -= speed; });
   620→    pipes = pipes.filter(p => p.x > -60);
   621→
   622→    // Move clouds
   623→    clouds.forEach(cl => { cl.x -= speed * 0.3; });
   624→    clouds = clouds.filter(cl => cl.x > -50);
   625→    if (Math.random() < 0.01) {
   626→      clouds.push({ x: W + 20, y: 5 + Math.random() * (H * 0.25), r: 15 + Math.random() * 15 });
   627→    }
   628→
   629→    // Spawns
   630→    spawnCoin();
   631→    spawnKoopa();
   632→    spawnPipe();
   633→
   634→    // Collision with coins
   635→    coins.forEach(c => {
   636→      if (!c.collected && collides(mario, c)) {
   637→        c.collected = true;
   638→        score++;
   639→        scoreEl.textContent = 'COINS: ' + score;
   640→      }
   641→    });
   642→
   643→    // Collision with koopas
   644→    for (const k of koopas) {
   645→      // Check if Mario jumps on top of koopa
   646→      if (mario.vy > 0 &&
   647→          mario.x + mario.w > k.x + 5 && mario.x < k.x + k.w - 5 &&
   648→          mario.y + mario.h > k.y && mario.y + mario.h < k.y + k.h * 0.5) {
   649→        // Bounce off koopa
   650→        mario.vy = -(H * 0.025);
   651→        mario.grounded = false;
   652→        k.x = -100; // remove
   653→        score += 3;
   654→        scoreEl.textContent = 'COINS: ' + score;
   655→      } else if (collidesStrict(mario, k)) {
   656→        gameOver();
   657→        return;
   658→      }
   659→    }
   660→
   661→    // Collision with pipes
   662→    for (const p of pipes) {
   663→      const pBox = { x: p.x - 5, y: ground - 50, w: 50, h: 50 };
   664→      if (collidesStrict(mario, pBox)) {
   665→        gameOver();
   666→        return;
   667→      }
   668→      // Mario can stand on pipe
   669→      const topBox = { x: p.x - 5, y: ground - 50, w: 50, h: 8 };
   670→      if (mario.vy >= 0 && mario.x + mario.w > topBox.x + 5 && mario.x < topBox.x + topBox.w - 5 &&
   671→          mario.y + mario.h >= topBox.y && mario.y + mario.h <= topBox.y + 15) {
   672→        mario.y = topBox.y - mario.h;
   673→        mario.vy = 0;
   674→        mario.grounded = true;
   675→        mario.jumping = false;
   676→      }
   677→    }
   678→  }
   679→
   680→  function collides(a, b) {
   681→    return a.x < b.x + b.w && a.x + a.w > b.x && a.y < b.y + b.h && a.y + a.h > b.y;
   682→  }
   683→  function collidesStrict(a, b) {
   684→    const shrink = 8;
   685→    return a.x + shrink < b.x + b.w - shrink && a.x + a.w - shrink > b.x + shrink &&
   686→           a.y + shrink < b.y + b.h && a.y + a.h > b.y + shrink;
   687→  }
   688→
   689→  function draw() {
   690→    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
   691→
   692→    // Sky gradient
   693→    const sky = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, H);
   694→    sky.addColorStop(0, '#1565C0');
   695→    sky.addColorStop(1, '#0D47A1');
   696→    ctx.fillStyle = sky;
   697→    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
   698→
   699→    // Clouds
   700→    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.6)';
   701→    clouds.forEach(cl => {
   702→      ctx.beginPath();
   703→      ctx.arc(cl.x, cl.y, cl.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
   704→      ctx.arc(cl.x + cl.r * 0.8, cl.y - cl.r * 0.3, cl.r * 0.7, 0, Math.PI * 2);
   705→      ctx.arc(cl.x - cl.r * 0.6, cl.y - cl.r * 0.1, cl.r * 0.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
   706→      ctx.fill();
   707→    });
   708→
   709→    // Pipes
   710→    pipes.forEach(p => drawPipe(p.x));
   711→
   712→    // Ground
   713→    drawGround();
   714→
   715→    // Coins (golden circles with star)
   716→    coins.forEach(c => {
   717→      if (c.collected) return;
   718→      ctx.save();
   719→      // Coin body
   720→      const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(c.x + c.w/2, c.y + c.h/2, 2, c.x + c.w/2, c.y + c.h/2, c.w/2);
   721→      grad.addColorStop(0, '#FFF176');
   722→      grad.addColorStop(0.5, '#FFD600');
   723→      grad.addColorStop(1, '#FF8F00');
   724→      ctx.fillStyle = grad;
   725→      ctx.beginPath();
   726→      ctx.ellipse(c.x + c.w/2, c.y + c.h/2, c.w/2, c.h/2, 0, 0, Math.PI * 2);
   727→      ctx.fill();
   728→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#E65100';
   729→      ctx.lineWidth = 2;
   730→      ctx.stroke();
   731→      // Star symbol
   732→      ctx.fillStyle = '#E65100';
   733→      ctx.font = (c.w * 0.6) + 'px sans-serif';
   734→      ctx.textAlign = 'center';
   735→      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
   736→      ctx.fillText('\u2605', c.x + c.w/2, c.y + c.h/2 + 1);
   737→      ctx.restore();
   738→    });
   739→
   740→    // Koopas
   741→    koopas.forEach(k => {
   742→      ctx.drawImage(koopaImg, k.x, k.y, k.w, k.h);
   743→    });
   744→
   745→    // Mario
   746→    ctx.drawImage(marioImg, mario.x, mario.y, mario.w, mario.h);
   747→  }
   748→
   749→  function gameLoop() {
   750→    if (!running) return;
   751→    update();
   752→    draw();
   753→    requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
   754→  }
   755→
   756→  function gameOver() {
   757→    running = false;
   758→    // Draw game over
   759→    draw();
   760→    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
   761→    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
   762→    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFD600';
   763→    ctx.font = 'bold ' + Math.min(W * 0.07, 36) + 'px Bangers, cursive';
   764→    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
   765→    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
   766→    ctx.fillText('GAME OVER !  Score: ' + score, W/2, H/2 - 10);
   767→    ctx.fillStyle = '#FFF';
   768→    ctx.font = Math.min(W * 0.04, 20) + 'px Fredoka, sans-serif';
   769→    ctx.fillText('Tap pour rejouer', W/2, H/2 + 20);
   770→    overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
   771→    overlay.querySelector('.game-start-text').innerHTML = 'GAME OVER ! Score: ' + score + '<br>Tap pour rejouer';
   772→  }
   773→
   774→  window.startGame = function() {
   775→    overlay.classList.add('hidden');
   776→    overlay.querySelector('.game-start-text').innerHTML = 'TAP ou ESPACE<br>pour jouer !';
   777→    resize();
   778→    initGame();
   779→    running = true;
   780→    gameLoop();
   781→  };
   782→
   783→  // Controls
   784→  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
   785→    if (e.code === 'Space' || e.code === 'ArrowUp') {
   786→      e.preventDefault();
   787→      if (!running) { startGame(); return; }
   788→      jump();
   789→    }
   790→  });
   791→  canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
   792→    e.preventDefault();
   793→    if (running) jump();
   794→  });
   795→  canvas.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
   796→    if (running) jump();
   797→  });
   798→
   799→  // Init
   800→  setTimeout(resize, 100);
   801→})();
   802→</script>
   803→</body>
   804→</html>
   805→
```
</details></tool-use>

```html
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bangers&family=Fredoka:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    margin: 0;
    font-family: 'Fredoka', sans-serif;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #2196F3;
  }

  .poster {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100vh;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #64B5F6 0%, #2196F3 30%, #1565C0 70%, #0D47A1 100%);
  }

  /* ===== ANIMATIONS ===== */
  @keyframes floatCloud {
    0% { transform: translateX(0); }
    100% { transform: translateX(-120vw); }
  }
  @keyframes twinkle {
    0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
    50% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 0.6; }
  }
  @keyframes spinCoin {
    0% { transform: rotateY(0deg); }
    100% { transform: rotateY(360deg); }
  }
  @keyframes bounce {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
    50% { transform: translateY(-10px); }
  }
  @keyframes popIn {
    0% { transform: scale(0) rotate(-10deg); opacity: 0; }
    60% { transform: scale(1.15) rotate(3deg); opacity: 1; }
    100% { transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
  }
  @keyframes marioJump {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) scaleX(1); }
    20% { transform: translateY(-15px) scaleX(1); }
    40% { transform: translateY(-25px) scaleX(1); }
    60% { transform: translateY(-15px) scaleX(1); }
  }
  @keyframes koopaWalk {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0) scaleX(-1); }
    25% { transform: translateX(-8px) scaleX(-1) rotate(-3deg); }
    75% { transform: translateX(8px) scaleX(-1) rotate(3deg); }
  }
  @keyframes mushroomBob {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }

  @keyframes questionPulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }

  }
  @keyframes slideUp {
    0% { transform: translateY(30px); opacity: 0; }
    100% { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
  }
  @keyframes rainbowScroll {
    0% { background-position: 0 0; }
    100% { background-position: 200px 0; }
  }
  @keyframes confetti {
    0% { transform: translateY(-10vh) rotate(0deg); opacity: 1; }
    100% { transform: translateY(105vh) rotate(720deg); opacity: 0.3; }
  }
  @keyframes badgePulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
    50% { transform: scale(1.06); }
  }

  /* Clouds - animated */
  .clouds {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 15vh;
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .cloud {
    position: absolute;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 50px;
    opacity: 0.85;
  }
  .cloud::before, .cloud::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 50%;
  }
  .cloud1 { width: 10vw; height: 3vh; top: 2vh; left: 105vw; animation: floatCloud 25s linear infinite; }
  .cloud1::before { width: 4vw; height: 4vh; top: -2.5vh; left: 1.5vw; }
  .cloud1::after { width: 6vw; height: 5vh; top: -3vh; left: 3vw; }

  .cloud2 { width: 12vw; height: 3.5vh; top: 5vh; left: 105vw; animation: floatCloud 35s linear infinite; animation-delay: -10s; }
  .cloud2::before { width: 5vw; height: 4.5vh; top: -2.8vh; left: 2vw; }
  .cloud2::after { width: 7vw; height: 5vh; top: -3.5vh; left: 4vw; }

  .cloud3 { width: 8vw; height: 2.5vh; top: 9vh; left: 105vw; animation: floatCloud 30s linear infinite; animation-delay: -20s; }
  .cloud3::before { width: 3.5vw; height: 3.5vh; top: -2vh; left: 1vw; }
  .cloud3::after { width: 5vw; height: 4vh; top: -2.5vh; left: 3vw; }

  .cloud4 { width: 10vw; height: 3vh; top: 1.5vh; left: 105vw; animation: floatCloud 28s linear infinite; animation-delay: -5s; }
  .cloud4::before { width: 4.5vw; height: 4vh; top: -2.5vh; left: 1.5vw; }
  .cloud4::after { width: 6vw; height: 4.5vh; top: -3vh; left: 4vw; }

  .cloud5 { width: 9vw; height: 2.8vh; top: 7vh; left: 105vw; animation: floatCloud 32s linear infinite; animation-delay: -15s; }
  .cloud5::before { width: 4vw; height: 3.8vh; top: -2.2vh; left: 1.2vw; }
  .cloud5::after { width: 5.5vw; height: 4.2vh; top: -2.8vh; left: 3.5vw; }

  /* Question blocks - animated */
  .question-block {
    width: 4vw; height: 4vw;
    max-width: 45px; max-height: 45px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD54F, #FF8F00);
    border: 3px solid #5D4037;

    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;

  }
  .qb1 { top: 12vh; left: 3%; animation-delay: 0s; }

  .qb4 { top: 44vh; right: 3%; animation-delay: 1.5s; }

  /* Bricks */
  .brick {
    width: 4vw; height: 4vw;
    max-width: 45px; max-height: 45px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #A1887F, #795548);
    border: 2px solid #4E342E;

  .brick::after {

    background: #4E342E;
  }
  .brick::before {
    content: '';

    left: 50%; top: 0; bottom: 0;

  }
  .br1 { top: 12vh; left: calc(3% + 4.5vw); }
  .br2 { top: 14vh; right: calc(4% + 4.5vw); }

  /* Stars - twinkling */
  .star {

  }
  .star svg { filter: drop-shadow(2px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)); }

  .coin {

  /* TITLE */
  .title-section {

  /* PHOTOS */
  .photos-section {

  .invitation-section {

  .bottom-text {

  /* Ground & Pipes */
  .ground-section {

  .pipe {

  .pipe-body {

  .pipe-top {
    width: clamp(50px, 7.5vw, 75px);

    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2E7D32, #4CAF50, #66BB6A, #4CAF50, #2E7D32);

    border-radius: 3px 3px 0 0;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .pipe-left { left: 2%; }
  .pipe-right { right: 2%; }

  @media print {
    body { width: 297mm; height: 420mm; overflow: visible; }
    .poster { height: 420mm; }
    *, .cloud, .star, .coin, .question-block, .character, .party-text, .age-badge, .confetti-piece {
      animation: none !important;

</style>
```

Bonne question ! Tu as plusieurs options :

**Option 1 : Screenshot / capture d'écran (le plus simple)**
- Ouvre le fichier dans ton navigateur (Chrome/Safari)
- Fais une capture d'écran sur ton téléphone ou ordi
- Envoie par WhatsApp, iMessage, etc.

**Option 2 : Export en PDF**
- Ouvre dans Chrome
- `Cmd + P` (imprimer)
- Choisis "Enregistrer en PDF"
- Envoie le PDF

**Option 3 : Imprimer l'affiche**
- Même chose via `Cmd + P` mais tu imprimes sur papier (idéal en A3 pour décorer la fête)
